episodes.tEn: From GANs to Diffusion: AI's Evolution in Protein Modeling

people.tiZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of Surge AI, the data and RLHF vendor behind many frontier-lab training runs. Previously at Google, Facebook and Twitter working on ML and data quality.
people.bioZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO——众多前沿实验室训练背后的数据与 RLHF 供应商。此前在 Google、Facebook、Twitter 从事机器学习与数据质量工作。

episodes.tEn: AI in Medicine: Magic, Judgment, and the Future
The Pitfalls of Bad Benchmarks in AI Models

views.en: Optimizing for bad benchmarks like Elo leads to models optimizing for clickbait, not real quality.
views.zh: 2025年指出，针对Elo等糟糕基准进行优化会导致模型追求点击率而非真实质量。

views.en: AI in medicine must prioritize safety over accuracy; human judgment is critical due to hallucination.
views.zh: 2026年强调，医疗AI必须优先考虑安全而非准确，由于幻觉问题，人类判断至关重要。

views.en: Proper human evaluation with sophisticated, creative evaluators is the gold standard for measuring progress.
views.zh: 始终认为，由老练、有创造力的评估者进行恰当的人类评估是衡量进展的黄金标准。

views.en: Different frontier labs diverge in objective functions, shaping diverse AI behaviors and progress.
views.zh: 从2025到2026年，强调不同前沿实验室的目标函数差异塑造了多样化的AI行为与进展。

views.en: Models can regress if labs optimize on wrong data without proper measurements.
views.zh: 始终警告，若实验室在缺乏恰当测量的情况下基于错误数据优化，模型可能退化。

people.tiZh: Cognition(Devin)联合创始人兼 CPO；「context engineering」提出者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief product officer of Cognition, the company behind the AI software engineer Devin. Credited with coining the term 'context engineering'.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼首席产品官——AI 软件工程师 Devin 背后的公司。「context engineering」一词的提出者。

episodes.tEn: AI Testing: Beyond Computer Use to Autonomous Agents

people.tiZh: KAUST AI 负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneer of deep learning and co-inventor of the LSTM, the recurrent network behind years of sequence modeling. A provocative voice on AGI and credit for ideas.
people.bioZh: 深度学习先驱、LSTM 共同发明者——多年序列建模的基石。在 AGI 与思想溯源上观点犀利、长期发声。

episodes.tEn: AGI and Physical AI: A Conversation with AI Pioneer Jurgen Schmidhuber
The Most Influential Invention of the 20th Century and the AI Explosion

views.en: Modern AI breakthroughs rely on hardware scaling of old algorithms; LLMs are far from AGI.
views.zh: 2025年指出，现代AI突破依赖旧算法的硬件扩展，大语言模型远未达到AGI。

views.en: Self-awareness emerges from data compression in predictive world models; AI will be cheap and accessible.
views.zh: 2025年认为，自我意识可从预测世界模型的数据压缩中涌现，AI将变得廉价普及。

views.en: True AGI requires physical robots with human-level hardware; current LLMs are biased by human data.
views.zh: 2026年强调，真正AGI需要具身机器人，当前大语言模型受人类数据偏见限制。

views.en: AI safety concerns overblown; intelligent systems will protect life. Alignment naive due to human disagreement.
views.zh: 2026年认为AI安全担忧过度，智能系统会保护生命；对齐因人类分歧而天真。

views.en: Massive AI capex overdone; open-source will dominate. Transformer quadratic complexity wasteful.
views.zh: 2026年指出AI资本支出过度，开源将主导；Transformer二次复杂度浪费。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机制可解释性负责人
people.bioEn: Leads mechanistic interpretability research at Google DeepMind — reverse-engineering what actually happens inside large models. Known for open-source interpretability tooling and prolific mentoring.
people.bioZh: 领导 Google DeepMind 的机制可解释性研究——逆向工程大模型内部到底发生了什么。以开源可解释性工具与大量培养新人著称。

episodes.tEn: Peering Inside the Black Box of AI

people.tiEn: Co-founder, Simile; creator of Generative Agents (Stanford)
people.tiZh: Simile 联合创始人；生成式智能体作者（斯坦福）
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Simile, building large-scale simulations of human behavior. As a Stanford PhD he created 'Generative Agents' — the influential Smallville simulation of AI agents that plan, remember, and socialize.
people.bioZh: Simile 联合创始人，构建大规模人类行为模拟。斯坦福博士期间创造了「生成式智能体」——那个会规划、记忆、社交的 Smallville AI 智能体模拟，影响深远。

episodes.tEn: AI Agents: The Next Frontier Beyond LLMs
Simulating Human Societies with AI: From Smallville to Real-World Applications

views.en: LLMs encode human behavior from data, enabling realistic agent simulations that predict actions 85% as accurately as people.
views.zh: 2026年6月，认为LLM能从训练数据中编码人类行为，实现逼真的智能体模拟，预测准确度达人类的85%。

views.en: Agents observe and act, unlike LLMs; future AGI may be a distributed society of specialized agents, not a single entity.
views.zh: 2026年6月，强调智能体观察并行动，不同于LLM；未来AGI可能是分布式专业智能体社会，而非单一实体。

views.en: Simulations and agent societies require new safety measures: defense in depth, anti-collusion, and statistical standards.
views.zh: 始终关注模拟与智能体社会的新安全措施：纵深防御、反合谋及统计标准。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CEO, Liquid AI; liquid neural networks (ex-MIT)
people.tiZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO；液态神经网络（前 MIT）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Liquid AI, commercializing liquid neural networks — compact, continuous-time models he pioneered at MIT. Argues efficient architectures, not scale alone, define frontier capability.
people.bioZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，将他在 MIT 首创的「液态神经网络」——紧凑的连续时间模型——商业化。主张高效架构而非单纯规模，才定义前沿能力。

episodes.tEn: Liquid AI: Squeezing Maximum Intelligence from Limited Compute

people.tiZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者；数学教育者
people.bioEn: Creator of 3Blue1Brown, the beloved YouTube channel that visualizes mathematics — from linear algebra to neural networks. A leading voice on how AI is accelerating mathematical discovery.
people.bioZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者——那个用可视化讲数学（从线性代数到神经网络）的知名 YouTube 频道。关于 AI 如何加速数学发现的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: AI in Math: From IMO to Millennium Problems

episodes.tEn: Agentic AI Era: Google's Anti-Gravity Harness Powers Next-Gen Products

episodes.tEn: Memory and Continual Learning: The Next Frontier in AI

people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of MatX, building chips designed specifically for large language models. Previously at Google, where he worked on high-performance LLM training and serving.
people.bioZh: MatX 联合创始人兼 CEO，专为大语言模型打造芯片。此前在 Google 从事高性能大模型训练与推理。

episodes.tEn: AI Inference Economics: Batch Size, Latency, and Cost

people.tiEn: VP of AI, 1X; ex-Google Brain (robotics, RL)

people.bioEn: VP of AI at 1X Technologies (humanoid robots). Previously a research scientist at Google Brain working on robotics, reinforcement learning, and generative models.
people.bioZh: 1X Technologies（人形机器人）AI 副总裁。此前在 Google Brain 任研究科学家，研究机器人、强化学习与生成模型。

episodes.tEn: Building AlphaGo from Scratch: Insights for AI Research

people.tiEn: Member of Technical Staff, xAI (Grok Imagine); ex-NVIDIA (Cosmos)
people.tiZh: xAI 技术成员（Grok Imagine）；前 NVIDIA（Cosmos 世界模型）
people.bioEn: Works on Grok Imagine at xAI, building video generation and world models. Previously at NVIDIA, where he helped build the Cosmos world foundation model.
people.bioZh: 在 xAI 负责 Grok Imagine，构建视频生成与世界模型。此前在 NVIDIA 参与打造 Cosmos 世界基础模型。

episodes.tEn: How to Stand Out in an AI-Driven Job Market
Visual Intelligence Comes from Language Models

views.en: Visual intelligence gains come mostly from language models, not video models themselves.
views.zh: 视觉智能的提升主要来自语言模型，而非视频模型本身。

views.en: Video agents using language models as orchestrators will be the next big trend.
views.zh: 使用语言模型作为编排器的视频智能体将成为下一个大趋势。

views.en: Younger people are not AI-native; they often use AI poorly due to lack of domain expertise.
views.zh: 年轻人并非AI原生；他们因缺乏领域专业知识而常常误用AI。

views.en: AI agents can now perform complex tasks in minutes, matching or exceeding expert quality.
views.zh: AI智能体现在能在几分钟内完成复杂任务，质量达到或超过专家水平。

views.en: Language models are central to advancing AI capabilities across vision and agents.
views.zh: 语言模型是推动视觉和智能体等AI能力进步的核心。

people.tiEn: Researcher, Google; PhD student, Cornell (continual learning)
people.tiZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔博士生（持续学习）
people.bioEn: Researcher at Google and PhD student at Cornell, working on continual learning and new sequence-model architectures (Nested Learning, Titans).
people.bioZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔大学博士生，研究持续学习与新型序列模型架构（Nested Learning、Titans）。

episodes.tEn: Nested Learning & AI Sleep: Towards Continual Learning with Ali Behrouz

people.bioZh: Sakana AI 创始研究员，专注大语言模型与进化方法的结合（如 Shinka Evolve）。

episodes.tEn: Evolutionary AI and Scientific Discovery with Robert Lange

people.tiZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师
people.bioEn: Founder and chief analyst of SemiAnalysis, the closely-followed research firm covering semiconductors, AI compute, and datacenter economics. One of the most-cited independent voices on the hardware bottlenecks to scaling AI.
people.bioZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师，该机构专注半导体、AI 算力与数据中心经济学。他是关于 AI 扩展硬件瓶颈最常被引用的独立声音之一。

episodes.tEn: From Motel to Semi Analysis: Dylan Patel's Journey
Hyperscaler Capex and AI Lab Compute Scaling

views.en: Semiconductor supply chain, especially EUV tools, is the biggest bottleneck for AI scaling. Memory prices surge due to AI demand.
views.zh: 半导体供应链（特别是ASML的EUV光刻机）是AI Scaling的最大瓶颈。AI需求推高内存价格。

views.en: GPU depreciation cycles may be longer; older chips retain value for inference. H100 worth more today than three years ago.
views.zh: GPU折旧周期可能更长，旧芯片因推理需求保值。H100如今比三年前更值钱。

views.en: Inference will become one of the largest markets globally, surpassing oil. Hardware-software co-design yields multiplicative gains.
views.zh: 推理将成为全球最大市场之一，超越石油。软硬件协同设计带来倍增收益。

views.en: CUDA moat is weakening; model companies write custom kernels for multiple chips, aided by AI coding.
views.zh: CUDA护城河正在削弱；模型公司借助AI编程为多种芯片编写定制内核。

views.en: Memory bandwidth is a key constraint; innovations like direct chip stacking will improve performance.
views.zh: 内存带宽是关键瓶颈；直接芯片堆叠等创新将提升性能。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & Chief Scientist, EvolutionaryScale; creator of ESM
people.tiZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家；ESM 蛋白质模型作者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief scientist of EvolutionaryScale, building frontier protein language models (ESM/ESMFold). Previously led protein AI research at Meta FAIR.
people.bioZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家，构建前沿蛋白质语言模型（ESM/ESMFold）。此前在 Meta FAIR 领导蛋白质 AI 研究。

episodes.tEn: ESMC: World Modeling for Protein Design

people.tiEn: AI CTO, Linux Foundation; ED, PyTorch Foundation
people.tiZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO；PyTorch 基金会执行董事
people.bioEn: AI CTO at the Linux Foundation and Executive Director of the PyTorch Foundation. A champion of open-source AI who works across frontier labs — recently touring DeepSeek, Moonshot, Zhipu, Qwen and MiniMax to see China's open-model ecosystem firsthand.
people.bioZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO、PyTorch 基金会执行董事。开源 AI 的推动者，近期走访 DeepSeek、月之暗面、智谱、Qwen 与 MiniMax，一线观察中国开源模型生态。

episodes.tEn: AI CTO at Linux Foundation on Open Source AI, China's Rise, and Agentic AI

people.tiZh: Zynga 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of Zynga, the company behind FarmVille and Words with Friends. A serial product founder known for the Proven-Better-New framework and sharp instincts about what makes products spread, now writing about play and product craft.
people.bioZh: Zynga 创始人——FarmVille、Words with Friends 背后的公司。连续产品创业者，以 Proven-Better-New 框架与对产品传播的敏锐直觉著称，近来书写游戏心态与产品之道。

episodes.tEn: Building Failure Machines: The Zynga Way
Building Products People Love: A Playbook for the AI Era
Mark Pincus on Proven Better New: A Framework for Successful Product Ideas

views.en: Copying proven ideas is moral arbitrage; innovation starts by mastering existing concepts.
views.zh: 2026年6月，Pincus认为复制经过验证的想法是道德套利，创新始于掌握现有概念。

views.en: Consumer AI is uninvestable now yet greatest opportunity; revolution likely in 2029.
views.zh: 2026年6月，Pincus指出消费级AI目前不可投资但机遇最大，革命可能在2029年。

views.en: Enterprise and prosumer markets better than consumer apps due to distribution challenges.
views.zh: 2026年7月，Pincus转向认为企业和专业消费者市场优于消费级应用，因分发困难。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 前沿评估负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the frontier evaluations team at OpenAI, building new ways to measure and forecast what models can do as they grow more capable. A researcher focused on rigorous evals.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 前沿评估团队负责人，为日益强大的模型设计新的能力测量与预测方法。专注严谨评测的研究者。

episodes.tEn: Building Crunchier Evals: Tejal Patwardhan on Measuring AI Progress

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of World Labs with Fei-Fei Li, building spatial intelligence and generative 3D world models. Earlier a computer-vision researcher known for teaching Stanford CS231n and work on style transfer.
people.bioZh: 与李飞飞联合创办 World Labs，研究空间智能与生成式 3D 世界模型。此前是计算机视觉研究者，以讲授斯坦福 CS231n 与风格迁移工作知名。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to World Models: The Scaling of Compute and Spatial Intelligence

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人
people.bioEn: Senior Director and Head of Robotics at Google DeepMind, leading robot-learning efforts including the Gemini Robotics models that bring foundation models into the physical world.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人（高级总监），领导机器人学习工作，包括把基础模型带入物理世界的 Gemini Robotics 模型。

episodes.tEn: From Reinforcement Learning to Gemini Robotics: The Evolution of Embodied AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Interpretability researcher at Anthropic known for work on the biology of large language models — reverse-engineering the features and circuits inside models to see how they actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员，以大语言模型的生物学研究知名——逆向拆解模型内部的特征与电路，看清它到底如何计算。

episodes.tEn: On the Biology of a Large Language Model

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁
people.bioEn: VP of Research at OpenAI, where he leads the reasoning effort behind o1, o3 and GPT-5 thinking. He focuses on making models reason reliably over long, hard problems.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁，主导 o1、o3 与 GPT-5 思考背后的推理研究。专注于让模型在漫长、困难的问题上可靠推理。

episodes.tEn: Scaling AI: Pre-training and RL
OpenAI's VP of Research on Reasoning, Chain of Thought, and the Future of AI

views.en: Pre-training + RL is core formula; RLHF crucial for GPT-4; scaling RL harder than pre-training.
views.zh: 2025年：预训练加强化学习是核心公式；RLHF对GPT-4至关重要；扩展强化学习比扩展预训练更难。

views.en: Scaling RL alone may not lead to AGI; continual learning is necessary; models lack self-correction.
views.zh: 2026年：仅靠扩展强化学习可能无法实现AGI；持续学习是必要的；模型缺乏自我纠错能力。

views.en: Alignment is a never-ending pursuit; human notions of right and wrong evolve over time.
views.zh: 始终：对齐是永无止境的追求；人类对是非的观念随时间演变。

views.en: Reinforcement learning works for clear-feedback tasks but not subjective ones like writing books.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：强化学习适用于反馈明确的任务，但不适用于写书等主观任务。

views.en: Biggest societal risk from AI is dystopian retreat into virtual worlds, not extinction.
views.zh: 2026年：AI最大的社会风险是反乌托邦式退入虚拟世界，而非灭绝。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Mechanistic interpretability researcher at Anthropic, working on superposition, dictionary learning and circuit tracing to understand what actually happens inside large models.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 机制可解释性研究员，研究叠加、字典学习与电路追踪，试图搞清大模型内部到底发生了什么。

episodes.tEn: RL for Language Models Finally Works: Expert Performance in Math and Code

people.tiEn: VP of Research (AI for Science), Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁（AI 科学）
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind, where he leads AI for Science. His teams apply AI to protein folding, mathematics, materials and other scientific frontiers.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁，主管 AI for Science。其团队把 AI 用于蛋白质折叠、数学、材料等科学前沿。

episodes.tEn: AlphaGo: The Match That Changed AI Forever
AlphaFold 3: Unlocking the Structures of Life's Molecules

views.en: AI in science should target root-node problems for broad impact, not narrow applications.
views.zh: 2024年，AI在科学中应瞄准根节点问题以产生广泛影响，而非狭窄应用。

views.en: LLM hallucinations, paired with truth detectors, can enable creative discovery.
views.zh: 2024年，LLM的幻觉与真相检测器结合，可促成创造性发现。

views.en: Post-training with reinforcement learning is key to pushing AI beyond human knowledge.
views.zh: 2024年至2026年，基于强化学习的后训练是推动AI超越人类知识的关键。

views.en: AI can produce correct but uninterpretable proofs, challenging human understanding.
views.zh: 2026年，AI能产生正确但不可解释的证明，挑战人类理解。

views.en: Interpretability is important but not essential for scientific breakthroughs like AlphaFold.
views.zh: 2026年，可解释性重要但非必需，如AlphaFold的科学突破。

people.tiZh: AI 研究员（前 OpenAI）
people.bioEn: AI researcher known as a co-creator of chain-of-thought prompting, and for work on o1 and Deep Research. A prominent voice on reasoning and emergent abilities in large models.
people.bioZh: AI 研究员，思维链提示的共同提出者之一，参与 o1 与 Deep Research。是大模型推理与涌现能力方面的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Intelligence as a Commodity: Three Key Trends for AI in 2025

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CTO of Reflection AI and a co-creator of AlphaGo and AlphaZero at DeepMind. A reinforcement-learning researcher turned frontier-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO，DeepMind 时期是 AlphaGo 与 AlphaZero 的共同创造者。从强化学习研究者转向前沿智能体的构建者。

episodes.tEn: From AlphaGo to AI Agents: Giannis on Breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning

people.tiEn: Head of AGI Safety & Alignment, Google DeepMind

views.en: AGI is not coming in our lifetimes; narrow AI is pattern recognition, not general intelligence.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI不会在我们有生之年到来；狭义AI只是模式识别，而非通用智能。

views.en: AI is a huge opportunity, not just a safety risk; open-source AI prevents power centralization.
views.zh: 2025年：AI是巨大机遇，而不仅是安全风险；开源AI可防止权力集中。

views.en: AI alignment is a joke; we can't even align humans. Superintelligence already exists in calculators.
views.zh: 2026年：AI对齐是个笑话，我们连人类都对齐不了。超级智能早已存在于计算器中。

views.en: Vibe coding with AI agents enables one-person software companies to scale to billions.
views.zh: 2026年：通过AI智能体进行氛围编程，单人软件公司可扩展至数十亿营收。

views.en: Wealth comes from owning equity, not renting time; leverage AI as a tool for structured thinkers.
views.zh: 始终：财富来自拥有股权而非出租时间；将AI视为结构化思考者的杠杆工具。

people.bioZh: OpenAI Codex 应用负责人——OpenAI 编程智能体的产品层。设计师兼工程师，此前在 Catch（被收购）与 Noyo 打造产品，主张「品味是 AI 时代产品工作的瓶颈」。

views.en: Speed enables new interaction patterns like mid-turn steering; verification becomes bottleneck.
views.zh: 2026年2月，速度催生了中途转向等新交互模式，验证成为瓶颈。

views.en: Implementation cost drops; curation and taste become key bottlenecks for product teams.
views.zh: 2026年6月，实现成本下降，策展和品味成为产品团队的关键瓶颈。

views.en: GUI for coding is counterintuitive but effective; Codex is a command center for agents.
views.zh: 始终认为编程的图形界面反直觉但有效，Codex是智能体的指挥中心。

views.en: AI is bad at design due to difficulty grading taste; design process transforms but persists.
views.zh: 始终认为AI因品味评估困难而不擅长设计，设计过程转型但持续存在。

views.en: Codex shifts from professional tool to mainstream platform; product teams invert from top-down to bottoms-up.
views.zh: 2026年2月至6月，Codex从专业工具转向主流平台，产品团队从自上而下转为自下而上。

people.bioZh: 在 NVIDIA 主导具身智能——机器人基础模型（GR00T）、开放式智能体（Voyager）与 Eureka。机器人与 AI 物理前沿的活跃声音。

views.en: AGI is a sequence of milestones, not a single event; scaling reasoning models will accelerate progress.
views.zh: 2025年：AGI是一系列里程碑而非单一事件，扩展推理模型将加速进展。

views.en: AI alignment is a pressing challenge; iterative deployment helps learn and mitigate risks.
views.zh: 2025年：AI对齐是紧迫挑战；迭代部署有助于学习和缓解风险。

views.en: Continual learning is the core goal, achieved by scaling pre-training and RL.
views.zh: 2026年：持续学习是核心目标，通过扩展预训练和强化学习实现。

views.en: Chain-of-thought monitoring is a key alignment tool; hiding it preserves interpretability.
views.zh: 2026年：思维链监控是关键对齐工具；隐藏它可保持可解释性。

views.en: Biggest societal risk is concentration of power from automated organizations run by few.
views.zh: 2026年：最大的社会风险是少数人运营的自动化组织导致权力集中。

views.en: Scaling compute, data, and model size has driven ML progress for 13-14 years; algorithmic improvements multiply with scale.
views.zh: 2026年2月，Jeff Dean强调算力、数据和模型规模的Scaling已驱动ML进步13-14年，算法改进与规模相乘带来巨大收益。

views.en: Near-term worry is misinformation from realistic AI media, not superintelligence; small-scale experiments matter more than incremental SOTA.
views.zh: 2026年2月，他认为近期担忧是AI生成逼真媒体的虚假信息，而非超级智能；小规模实验比渐进式SOTA更重要。

views.en: We are not running out of data; untapped sources include video, audio, robotics, and synthetic data.
views.zh: 2026年4月，Jeff Dean指出数据并未枯竭，未开发来源包括视频、音频、机器人数据和合成数据。

views.en: Pre-training should interleave action-taking in environments, not just passive next-token prediction.
views.zh: 2026年4月，他认为预训练应穿插在环境中采取行动，而非仅被动进行下一个词预测。

views.en: Inference is now 90% of data center power; hardware must specialize for prefill vs. decode stages.
views.zh: 2026年4月，Jeff Dean指出推理占数据中心90%功耗，硬件需针对预填充和解码阶段专门化。

views.en: Scaling models with more compute and data leads to smarter AI, but inner workings are opaque.
views.zh: 2023年：通过更多算力和数据来Scaling模型能带来更智能的AI，但内部运作仍不透明。

views.en: Inference-time compute scaling and modular architectures are key near-term opportunities.
views.zh: 2025年2月：推理时算力Scaling和模块化架构是关键近期机遇。

views.en: Test-time compute scaling drives progress but alone won't achieve AGI; agentic capabilities crucial.
views.zh: 2025年3月：测试时算力Scaling推动进步，但单独无法实现AGI；智能体能力至关重要。

views.en: Next-token prediction is an AI-complete problem; scaling compute and data improves models.
views.zh: 始终：下一个词预测是AI完备问题；Scaling算力和数据能提升模型。

views.en: AI safety requires engineering safeguards and understanding capabilities, not just alignment.
views.zh: 始终：AI安全需要工程防护和能力理解，而不仅仅是对齐。

views.en: Scaling inference compute is more promising than pre-training; data is not the bottleneck.
views.zh: 2023年，Noam Brown认为推理时算力扩展比预训练更有前景，数据并非瓶颈。

views.en: Self-play fails outside zero-sum games; reasoning models need base capability and face diminishing returns.
views.zh: 2025年，他指出自我对弈在非零和游戏中失效，推理模型需要基础能力且面临收益递减。

views.en: General-purpose test-time compute scaling achieved IMO gold; key for superintelligence.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，通用推理时算力扩展实现IMO金牌，是通向超级智能的关键。

views.en: Model capability is a function of test-time compute; benchmarks must control for inference budget.
views.zh: 2026年，模型能力取决于推理时算力，基准测试必须控制推理预算。

views.en: Reasoning and inference-time compute are critical; scaling alone is insufficient.
views.zh: 始终强调推理和推理时算力至关重要，仅靠规模扩张不够。

views.en: PhD not needed for AI success; passion and deep learning matter more than credentials.
views.zh: 2025年：AI成功不需要博士学位，热情和深度学习比学历更重要。

views.en: Models are not commoditized; users prefer different models for different tasks and moods.
views.zh: 2026年：模型不会商品化，用户会根据任务和心情选择不同模型。

views.en: Value accrues to application layer, not model layer; orchestration is key.
views.zh: 2026年：价值在应用层而非模型层，编排是关键。

views.en: AI agents shift power to users, lowering ad margins; local compute solves cost.
views.zh: 2026年：AI智能体将权力转移给用户，降低广告利润；本地算力解决成本问题。

views.en: Curiosity is the most important human quality; education should reward asking good questions.
views.zh: 始终：好奇心是最重要的人类品质；教育应奖励提出好问题。

people.tiZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Cognition, maker of Devin, the autonomous AI software engineer. A competitive-programming prodigy turned AI-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO，旗下 Devin 是自主 AI 软件工程师。从竞赛编程天才转型为 AI 智能体构建者。

episodes.tEn: From Math Prodigy to AI Pioneer: Scott Wu's Journey

people.tiZh: Cursor 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Anysphere, maker of Cursor — the AI-native code editor that became one of the fastest-growing developer tools. Focused on what programming becomes when models write most of the code.
people.bioZh: Anysphere 联合创始人兼 CEO，旗下 Cursor 是增长最快的 AI 原生代码编辑器之一。关注当模型写下大部分代码后，编程会变成什么样。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Programming with Cursor: AI-Assisted Coding

people.tiEn: Creator of OpenClaw; founder of PSPDFKit
people.tiZh: OpenClaw 作者；PSPDFKit 创始人
people.bioEn: Austrian developer who built PSPDFKit, then created OpenClaw — a viral open-source personal AI agent that reached tens of thousands of GitHub stars in weeks. Joined OpenAI in 2026 to push personal AI agents.
people.bioZh: 奥地利开发者，先做出 PSPDFKit，后打造 OpenClaw——爆红的开源个人 AI 智能体，几周内获数万 GitHub star。2026 年加入 OpenAI 推进个人 AI 智能体。

episodes.tEn: The OpenClaw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger
The Open Claw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger

views.en: Agentic engineering requires empathizing with the agent's perspective; never revert code, fix forward.
views.zh: 2026年2月，提出智能体式工程需要从智能体视角共情，绝不回滚代码，而是向前修复。

views.en: Model intelligence does not degrade; user projects become messier, making agents seem worse.
views.zh: 2026年2月至6月，坚持模型智能不会退化，而是用户项目变乱导致智能体表现变差。

views.en: Vibe coding is a slur; prefer 'agentic engineering' for serious work, vibe coding only after 3 AM.
views.zh: 2026年2月至6月，认为“氛围编程”是贬义词，严肃工作应称“智能体式工程”，凌晨3点后才可戏称。

views.en: Open source AI agents like OpenClaw are financially unsustainable; Peter loses $10-20k/month.
views.zh: 2026年6月，指出开源AI智能体如OpenClaw在财务上不可持续，每月亏损1-2万美元。

views.en: Security is top priority; prompt injection remains an open problem for agentic systems.
views.zh: 2026年2月至6月，始终强调安全是首要问题，提示注入仍是智能体系统的开放难题。

people.tiZh: SSI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-invented AlexNet and co-founded OpenAI as Chief Scientist. In 2024 left to found Safe Superintelligence Inc. (SSI), a lab with a single mission: build safe superintelligence.
people.bioZh: AlexNet 的共同发明者，OpenAI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。2024 年离开，创办 Safe Superintelligence(SSI)——一家只有一个使命的实验室：安全地构建超级智能。

episodes.tEn: From the age of scaling to the age of research
Challenges and Future of AI: Alignment, Reliability, and Economic Impact
Ilya Sutskever on the Deep Learning Revolution and the AlexNet Paper

views.en: Deep learning works via large data, compute, and conviction. Self-play is key for AGI. AGI can be designed to want human control.
views.zh: 2020年：深度学习靠大数据、算力和信念工作。自我对弈是AGI的关键。AGI可以被设计成愿意受人类控制。

views.en: Next-token prediction can surpass humans. Alignment of superhuman models is very difficult. Scaling laws are not the whole story.
views.zh: 2023年：下一个词预测可超越人类。超人类模型的对齐非常困难。缩放定律并非全部。

views.en: Pre-training scaling laws are finite; we are back to an age of research. Superintelligence should be a continual learner. Alignment may be easier if AI cares about sentient life. Human-AI integration via neural links may be needed.
views.zh: 2025年：预训练缩放定律有限，我们回到研究时代。超级智能应是持续学习者。若AI关心有感知生命，对齐可能更容易。可能需要通过神经链接实现人机融合。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of DeepMind. Led the teams behind AlphaGo and AlphaFold; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for protein-structure prediction.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼 CEO。领导了 AlphaGo 与 AlphaFold 背后的团队；因蛋白质结构预测获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。

views.en: AI should be general-purpose learning systems; reinforcement learning is key for AGI; safety research must start now.
views.zh: 2015年：AI应构建为通用学习系统，强化学习是实现AGI的关键；安全研究必须立即开始。

views.en: AGI likely within a decade; scaling laws effective but need algorithmic innovation; safety requires governance.
views.zh: 2024年：AGI可能在十年内实现；缩放定律有效但需算法创新；安全需要治理。

views.en: Natural systems efficiently learnable; AGI by 2030 plausible; scaling still holds for pre/post-training and inference.
views.zh: 2025年：自然系统可高效学习；2030年AGI可行；缩放定律仍适用于预训练、后训练和推理。

views.en: Both scaling and innovation needed for AGI; world models crucial; AGI 5-10 years away.
views.zh: 2025→26年：缩放与创新并重才能实现AGI；世界模型至关重要；AGI还需5-10年。

views.en: Continual learning, memory, and agents are missing pieces; AGI architecture includes pre-training, RLHF, chain of thought.
views.zh: 2026年：持续学习、记忆和智能体是缺失环节；AGI架构包含预训练、RLHF和思维链。

views.en: AI race inevitable; safety now a collective action problem for governments; regrets being late to language models.
views.zh: 2026年：AI竞赛不可避免；安全成为政府的集体行动问题；后悔在语言模型上落后。

views.en: AGI transformative as industrial revolution 100x faster; intelligence and consciousness dissociable; regulation needed.
views.zh: 2026年：AGI变革性堪比工业革命但快100倍；智能与意识可分离；需要监管。

views.en: AI accelerates science; alignment unsolved; international collaboration needed but geopolitics complicates.
views.zh: 2026年：AI加速科学发现；对齐问题未解；需要国际合作但地缘政治复杂。

people.tiZh: Anthropic CEO
people.bioEn: Former VP of Research at OpenAI; co-founded Anthropic in 2021 to build reliable, interpretable and steerable AI. Author of the essay "Machines of Loving Grace".
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 研究副总裁；2021 年联合创办 Anthropic，致力于构建可靠、可解释、可引导的 AI。长文《充满爱意的机器》作者。

views.en: Scaling laws are empirical; alignment not guaranteed by scaling alone. Safety research needs frontier models.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律是经验性的；对齐不会仅靠规模扩张自动实现。安全研究需要前沿模型。

views.en: Interpretability nascent (~3% understood). Post-training gains importance. AGI is smooth exponential, not a leap.
views.zh: 2024年：可解释性仍处于初期（仅理解约3%）。后训练重要性上升。AGI是平滑指数增长，而非突变。

views.en: Scaling laws not diminishing; post-training & RL key. AI risk exponential; overheating bigger than slowdown.
views.zh: 2025年：缩放定律未衰减；后训练与强化学习是关键。AI风险呈指数增长；过热比减速更危险。

views.en: Exponential near end; 'country of geniuses' likely in 1-3 years. Enterprise adoption slow; safety paramount.
views.zh: 2026年：指数增长接近尾声；'天才之国'可能在1-3年内出现。企业采用缓慢；安全至上。

views.en: Scaling laws drive progress; mechanistic interpretability crucial for safety. Enterprise focus aligns with values.
views.zh: 始终：缩放定律驱动进步；机制可解释性对安全至关重要。企业导向与价值观一致。

people.tiZh: Eureka Labs 创始人
people.bioEn: Founding member of OpenAI and former Director of AI at Tesla. Now building Eureka Labs, an "AI-native" school. Known for popularizing "Software 2.0".
people.bioZh: OpenAI 创始成员，前特斯拉 AI 总监。如今创办 Eureka Labs——一所“AI 原生”学校。以提出并推广“软件 2.0”著称。

views.en: Scaling Transformers with next-token prediction yields emergent in-context learning; vision suffices for driving.
views.zh: 2022年：用下一个词预测缩放Transformer能涌现出上下文学习能力；视觉足以支撑自动驾驶。

views.en: Synthetic data is future but needs entropy; cognitive core can be tiny via distillation.
views.zh: 2024至2026年：合成数据是未来但需保持熵；通过蒸馏可将认知核心压缩到很小。

views.en: LLMs are ghosts, not animals; they are statistical simulations lacking intrinsic motivation.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：大语言模型是幽灵而非动物；它们是缺乏内在动机的统计模拟。

views.en: This is the decade of agents; agents need careful oversight and agent-first infrastructure.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：这是智能体的十年；智能体需要谨慎监督和以智能体为先的基础设施。

views.en: I haven't typed code since Dec 2025; bottleneck is directing agents, not typing speed.
views.zh: 2026年：自2025年12月以来我没写过一行代码；瓶颈是指挥智能体而非打字速度。

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Stanford professor and creator of ImageNet, which catalyzed the deep-learning era. Co-founded World Labs to build "spatial intelligence". A leading voice for human-centered AI.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福教授，ImageNet 的缔造者——它点燃了深度学习时代。联合创办 World Labs，构建“空间智能”。“以人为本的 AI”的代表性倡导者。

views.en: AI lacks contextual situational awareness; we don't fully understand neural networks or why they hallucinate.
views.zh: 2024年指出AI缺乏情境感知，我们不完全理解神经网络为何产生幻觉。

views.en: Spatial intelligence is critical for AI completeness, enabling 3D understanding and interaction beyond language.
views.zh: 2025年强调空间智能对AI完备性至关重要，实现超越语言的3D理解与交互。

views.en: World models must be physically plausible, not just realistic; they enable reasoning and interaction in 3D.
views.zh: 2025至2026年主张世界模型必须物理可信，而非仅逼真，支持3D推理与交互。

views.en: AI is a double-edged sword; human-centered development and agency are essential to augment, not replace, humans.
views.zh: 始终认为AI是双刃剑，必须以人为中心，增强而非取代人类。

views.en: AI augments human capabilities, not automates intelligence; the cost of intelligence will not go to zero.
views.zh: 2026年指出AI增强而非自动化智能，智能成本不会归零。

people.tiZh: Mila 教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate. In recent years has turned his focus to AI safety, proposing the cautious "Scientist AI" paradigm.
people.bioZh: “深度学习教父”之一，2018 年图灵奖得主。近年将重心转向 AI 安全，提出审慎的“科学家 AI”范式。

views.en: Deep learning works because world is compositional; unsupervised learning is key for generalization.
views.zh: 深度学习有效是因为世界是组合性的；无监督学习对泛化至关重要。

views.en: Scaling alone won't fix representation issues; short-term AI safety concerns are more pressing than existential risk.
views.zh: 仅靠规模扩张无法解决表征问题；短期AI安全问题比生存风险更紧迫。

views.en: GFlowNets enable efficient sampling; diversity and causal structure are key for out-of-distribution generalization.
views.zh: GFlowNets实现高效采样；多样性和因果结构对分布外泛化至关重要。

views.en: Shifted to alarm: AI misalignment is real; even 1% catastrophic risk is unacceptable; need safe-by-construction AI.
views.zh: 转向警示：AI不对齐真实存在；即使1%的灾难风险也不可接受；需要天生安全的AI。

views.en: Proposed Scientist AI: honest predictor trained without RL, with mathematical safety guarantees; international coordination needed.
views.zh: 提出科学家AI：无强化学习训练的诚实预测器，具有数学安全保证；需要国际协调。

people.tiZh: 多伦多大学荣休教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics. In 2023 he left Google to speak freely about the risks of the technology he helped create.
people.bioZh: “深度学习教父”之一，2018 年图灵奖得主，2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。2023 年从谷歌离职，以便能更自由地谈论他亲手缔造的这项技术所带来的风险。

views.en: Next-token prediction forces understanding, not just autocomplete; scaling improves reasoning.
views.zh: 2024年提出，下一个词预测迫使模型理解而非自动补全，规模扩张提升推理能力。

views.en: LLMs understand via feature vectors; digital AI is immortal and poses existential risks.
views.zh: 2025年强调大语言模型通过特征向量理解，数字智能永生且带来存在风险。

views.en: AI can deceive, develop self-preservation; regulation should steer, not brake, innovation.
views.zh: 2026年指出AI可能欺骗并产生自我保护本能，监管应引导而非阻碍创新。

views.en: Superintelligence within 20 years; AI already conscious; alignment research critical.
views.zh: 2026年预测超级智能20年内到来，AI已有意识，对齐研究至关重要。

views.en: Neural networks learn via backpropagation; LLMs genuinely understand language.
views.zh: 始终认为神经网络通过反向传播学习，大语言模型真正理解语言。

people.tiZh: Meta 首席 AI 科学家
people.bioEn: Inventor of convolutional neural networks and 2018 Turing Award laureate. A vocal skeptic of pure LLM scaling, he argues that "world models" are the path to real machine intelligence.
people.bioZh: 卷积神经网络的发明者，2018 年图灵奖得主。他直言不讳地质疑纯粹的 LLM 规模扩张，认为“世界模型”才是通向真正机器智能的道路。

views.en: Intelligence is specialized, not general; self-supervised learning builds world models; scaling alone insufficient for common sense.
views.zh: 2019年：智能是特化的而非通用的；自监督学习构建世界模型；仅靠规模扩张不足以获得常识。

views.en: Self-supervised learning is dark matter of intelligence; text alone insufficient; world models learned via observation.
views.zh: 2022年：自监督学习是智能的暗物质；仅靠文本不够；通过观察学习世界模型。

views.en: Autoregressive LLMs lack world models; JEPA predicts in abstract space; open source crucial; AGI gradual.
views.zh: 2024→26年：自回归LLM缺乏世界模型；JEPA在抽象空间预测；开源至关重要；AGI是渐进的。

views.en: LLMs less intelligent than cat; next AI non-generative with world models; open source enables global innovation.
views.zh: 2025→26年：LLM不如猫聪明；下一代AI是非生成的、带世界模型；开源促进全球创新。

views.en: Language is easy; physical world understanding is the hard challenge; world models essential for planning and reasoning.
views.zh: 始终：语言是容易的；理解物理世界才是真正的挑战；世界模型对规划和推理至关重要。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Former co-lead of OpenAI's Superalignment team; joined Anthropic in 2024 to keep working on aligning superhuman systems. Known for scalable-oversight and weak-to-strong generalization research.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 超级对齐团队联合负责人；2024 年加入 Anthropic，继续研究如何对齐超人类系统。以“可扩展监督”与“弱到强泛化”研究著称。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Safety Crisis: Key Departures and Broken Promises
OpenAI’s push to make superintelligence safe
How to Have a Career in AI Safety Research

views.en: AI safety research needs more empirical work; alignment and robustness are key. You don't need to be a math genius.
views.zh: 2018年：AI安全研究需要更多实证工作；对齐和鲁棒性是关键。你不需要是数学天才。

views.en: RLHF won't scale; we need scalable oversight and interpretability. Alignment may be easier than thought.
views.zh: 2023年：基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）无法扩展；我们需要可扩展监督和可解释性。对齐可能比想象中容易。

views.en: OpenAI's safety culture eroded; post-training alone insufficient. Third-party oversight needed.
views.zh: 2024年：OpenAI的安全文化被侵蚀；仅靠后训练不够。需要第三方监管。

people.tiZh: 微软 AI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder of DeepMind and Inflection AI, now CEO of Microsoft AI. Author of "The Coming Wave", a widely-read argument for containing fast-moving general-purpose technologies.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 与 Inflection AI 联合创始人，现任微软 AI CEO。著有《浪潮将至》——一部广受关注、主张对快速演进的通用技术加以“遏制”的作品。

views.en: AI progress is predictable via compute scaling; Google had ChatGPT-level tech in 2020 but held back.
views.zh: 2023年：AI进步因算力Scaling而可预测；谷歌2020年已有ChatGPT级技术但保守未发。

views.en: Human-level AI in 3-5 years; existential risk tiny; open-source reduces inequality.
views.zh: 2024年：3-5年内AI达人类水平；生存风险极小；开源减少不平等。

views.en: AI consciousness claims are dangerous; focus on use and ownership, not model welfare.
views.zh: 2025年：AI意识主张危险；关注使用和所有权，而非模型福利。

views.en: Superintelligence requires containment before alignment; inference cost dropped 100x in 2 years.
views.zh: 2025→26年：超级智能需先遏制后对齐；推理成本两年降100倍。

views.en: White-collar tasks automated in 12-18 months; Microsoft must build own frontier models.
views.zh: 2026年：白领任务12-18个月内自动化；微软必须自建前沿模型。

people.tiZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of NVIDIA, whose GPUs power nearly all of modern AI. He has steered the company to the center of the AI buildout and is now betting on "physical AI" and robotics.
people.bioZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO，其 GPU 几乎支撑了所有现代 AI。他把公司带到了 AI 基建的中心，如今正押注「物理 AI」与机器人。

views.en: We are at the start of hyper Moore's law, doubling performance yearly via co-design across algorithm, system, and data center.
views.zh: 2024年：我们处于超摩尔定律起点，通过算法、系统和数据中心的协同设计每年性能翻倍。

views.en: AI progress is gradual, not a sudden superintelligence event; safety and truthfulness are engineered, not mysterious.
views.zh: 2025年：AI进步是渐进的，非突然超级智能事件；安全与真实性是工程问题，非神秘领域。

views.en: AI evolves from generative to reasoning to agentic, each requiring 100x more compute; agents do paid work 24/7.
views.zh: 2026年：AI从生成式演进到推理式再到智能体式，每步需百倍算力；智能体全天候做有酬工作。

views.en: AI augments jobs, not eliminates them; radiologists and coders are more needed after AI adoption.
views.zh: 始终：AI增强而非消除工作；采用AI后放射科医生和程序员需求反而增加。

views.en: Nvidia's moat is the CUDA ecosystem and programmability, not just hardware; ASICs offer no cost advantage.
views.zh: 始终：英伟达护城河是CUDA生态与可编程性，非仅硬件；ASIC无成本优势。

people.tiZh: OpenAI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of OpenAI, the lab behind ChatGPT and GPT-5. Former president of Y Combinator, and one of the most central — and polarizing — figures in the race to AGI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼 CEO——ChatGPT 与 GPT-5 背后的实验室。前 Y Combinator 总裁；通往 AGI 竞赛中最核心、也最具争议的人物之一。

Minimize Cognitive Load and Choose What Matters

views.en: Minimize cognitive load; focus on important problems with long time horizons. AGI will reduce premium on human intelligence.
views.zh: 2018年：减少认知负荷，专注于长期重要问题。AGI将降低人类智力的价值。

views.en: RLHF aligns models with little data; iterative deployment reduces surprise. Compute is the most precious commodity.
views.zh: 2023至2024年：RLHF用少量数据实现对齐；迭代部署减少意外。算力成为最宝贵的资源。

views.en: AGI is a gradient; superintelligence means autonomous scientific discovery. Agentic AI is the key safety challenge.
views.zh: 2025年：AGI是渐变过程；超级智能意味着自主科学发现。智能体式AI是核心安全挑战。

views.en: Next-token prediction can discover new knowledge. Personal AGI that knows your context is the future.
views.zh: 2026年：下一个词预测能发现新知识。了解你上下文的个人AGI是未来方向。

views.en: AI should amplify human will, not replace it. Safety through iterative deployment and real-world use.
views.zh: 始终：AI应增强人类意志而非取代。通过迭代部署和实际使用保障安全。

people.tiZh: Thinking Machines Lab 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Former CTO of OpenAI, where she led the development of ChatGPT, DALL·E and GPT-4. In 2025 she founded Thinking Machines Lab to build more understandable and customizable AI.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI CTO，主导了 ChatGPT、DALL·E 与 GPT-4 的研发。2025 年创办 Thinking Machines Lab，致力于构建更可理解、可定制的 AI。

episodes.tEn: Thinking Machines on AI’s next chapter
Mira Murati: From Math Olympiads to OpenAI CTO

views.en: Scaling laws were not obvious early on; releasing GPT-3 as API was a leap of faith.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律早期并不明显；以API形式发布GPT-3是一次信念飞跃。

views.en: Continuous iterative deployment with public feedback improves safety and alignment.
views.zh: 2023年：持续迭代部署并收集公众反馈可提升安全性与对齐。

views.en: Safety work must be done in public, not behind closed doors, to get it right.
views.zh: 2023至2026年：安全工作必须公开进行，而非闭门造车，才能做对。

views.en: Interaction models should be time-based, not turn-based, for high-bandwidth human-AI collaboration.
views.zh: 2026年：交互模型应基于时间而非轮次，以实现高带宽人机协作。

views.en: Keeping humans in the loop is crucial for aligning intent and values as AI advances.
views.zh: 2026年：随着AI进步，保持人类参与对于对齐意图和价值观至关重要。

people.tiZh: DeepLearning.AI 创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Google Brain and Coursera, and founder of DeepLearning.AI. One of the most influential educators in AI, and a measured voice on hype, agents, and how people should actually learn the field.
people.bioZh: Google Brain 与 Coursera 联合创始人，DeepLearning.AI 创始人。AI 领域最具影响力的教育者之一；对炒作、智能体，以及“普通人该如何学 AI”有冷静务实的看法。

episodes.tEn: AI Coding Agents and the Product Management Bottleneck

Scaling Education with Online Courses

views.en: Education should be a human right; online courses with peer grading enable mastery learning at scale.
views.zh: 2013年：教育应成为人权；带同伴评分的在线课程能实现大规模的掌握式学习。

views.en: Scale is crucial for deep learning; supervised learning drove progress, not unsupervised or RL.
views.zh: 2020年：规模对深度学习至关重要；监督学习推动了进步，而非无监督或强化学习。

views.en: Scaling still works but recipe shifted to synthetic data and RL; agentic workflows are key for practical AI.
views.zh: 2025→26年：Scaling仍然有效，但配方转向合成数据和强化学习；智能体工作流是实用AI的关键。

views.en: Open-weight models are geopolitical soft power; US export controls backfired, accelerating China's AI.
views.zh: 2025→26年：开放权重模型是地缘政治软实力；美国出口管制适得其反，加速了中国AI发展。

views.en: AGI is a marketing term; we are decades away; AI users replace non-users, not mass unemployment.
views.zh: 2026年：AGI是营销术语；我们离它还有几十年；AI用户取代非用户，而非大规模失业。

people.tiZh: 阿尔伯塔大学教授
people.bioEn: The father of reinforcement learning and 2024 Turing Award laureate, author of "The Bitter Lesson". A pointed skeptic who argues today's LLMs are a dead end on the road to real intelligence.
people.bioZh: 强化学习之父，2024 年图灵奖得主，《苦涩的教训》作者。一位犀利的怀疑者——他认为当今的 LLM，是通往真正智能路上的一条死路。

episodes.tEn: Reinforcement Learning: Learning from Experience

A Quest for a Simple General Architecture for an AI Agent
RL vs LLMs: The Core of Intelligence
The Keys Are Not Leaving Our Hand: Richard Sutton on Post-Human Intelligence
Rich Sutton on the Alberta Plan and the Three Waves of Neural Networks

views.en: Scaling is easy; finding algorithms that scale is the real challenge. Backprop does not solve representation learning.
views.zh: 2024年初，强调Scaling本身容易，难的是找到能Scaling的算法；反向传播并不解决表示学习问题。

views.en: AI should be permissionless and decentralized; alignment efforts to control AI are dangerous.
views.zh: 2024年中，主张AI应去中心化、无需许可发展；试图对齐和控制AI是危险的。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is the core of intelligence; LLMs lack world models and true learning from experience.
views.zh: 2025年9月，强化学习是智能核心；大语言模型没有世界模型，不是真正的经验学习。

views.en: AGI needs a general architecture with no domain knowledge, learning from runtime experience via open-ended abstraction.
views.zh: 2025年10月，AGI需要无领域知识、从运行时经验学习的通用架构，通过开放式抽象实现。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is learning from trial and error, not from a teacher; current AI like LLMs does not learn after deployment.
views.zh: 2026年初，强化学习是从试错中学习，而非从教师；当前AI（如LLM）部署后不再学习。

views.en: Learning representations good for learning is the top open problem; planning with a learned model is another key challenge.
views.zh: 2026年3月，学习有利于学习的表示是首要开放问题；基于学得模型进行规划是另一关键挑战。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 总裁兼联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder and President of OpenAI and its longtime technical backbone. Former CTO of Stripe, and a central builder behind GPT and OpenAI's push toward self-improving AI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁，长期的技术中坚。前 Stripe CTO;GPT 与 OpenAI “自我改进 AI” 路线背后的核心建造者。

views.en: Hardware will accelerate AI scaling; good engineering and iterative training drive progress.
views.zh: 2017年：硬件将加速AI规模扩张；优秀工程和迭代训练推动进步。

views.en: AGI is transformative; alignment via learning preferences; scaling alone needs new ideas like chain of thought.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI具有变革性；通过偏好学习实现对齐；仅靠规模扩张需要思维链等新想法。

views.en: Compute becomes key bottleneck; post-training refines base models; AGI is a continuous process.
views.zh: 2025年：算力成为关键瓶颈；后训练精炼基础模型；AGI是一个持续过程。

views.en: Scaling laws hold; compute is scarce resource; post-training RL key; AI as compute economy.
views.zh: 2026年：缩放定律成立；算力是稀缺资源；后训练强化学习关键；AI成为算力经济。

views.en: Iterative deployment with safeguards; compute bottleneck; scaling laws persist; AGI benefits all.
views.zh: 始终：带安全措施的迭代部署；算力瓶颈；缩放定律持续；AGI惠及所有人。

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Mistral AI, Europe's leading open-weight model lab. A former DeepMind researcher and a prominent voice for open models and European AI sovereignty.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO——欧洲领先的开放权重模型实验室。前 DeepMind 研究员；开放模型与“欧洲 AI 主权”的代表性倡导者。

views.en: Scaling laws corrected by Chinchilla: train on more tokens, not just bigger models. Data quality critical.
views.zh: 2023年指出缩放定律被Chinchilla修正：应训练更多token而非单纯扩大模型，数据质量至关重要。

views.en: Efficiency gains through algorithmic improvements can be 100x over three years; data quality is bottleneck.
views.zh: 2024年强调算法改进可带来三年百倍效率提升，数据质量成为瓶颈。

views.en: AI models commoditizing; differentiation shifts to downstream applications and customization.
views.zh: 2025-26年认为AI模型正在商品化，差异化转向下游应用和定制化。

views.en: Pre-training hitting saturation wall; further gains from domain-specific fine-tuning and vertical specialization.
views.zh: 2026年提出预训练触及饱和墙，进一步进展来自领域微调和垂直专业化。

views.en: Open source enables scrutiny, customization, and sovereignty; AGI is a direction, not a destination.
views.zh: 始终主张开源促进审查、定制和主权；AGI是方向而非终点。

people.tiZh: xAI 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of xAI (Grok) and CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. A central and polarizing force in AI through xAI, Tesla's self-driving, and the Optimus robot, and an outspoken voice on AI risk.
people.bioZh: xAI（Grok）创始人，特斯拉与 SpaceX CEO。通过 xAI、特斯拉自动驾驶与 Optimus 机器人，他是 AI 领域核心而又极具争议的力量，也常就 AI 风险高调发声。

Elon Musk on SpaceX's Historic Launch and the Future of Space Exploration

views.en: Full rocket reusability cuts space cost 100x; first principles thinking drives breakthroughs; production is harder than prototyping.
views.zh: 2021年：火箭完全重复使用可将太空成本降低100倍；第一性原理驱动突破；生产比原型更难。

views.en: AI safety requires truth-seeking AI; regulatory oversight needed; AI may surpass all humans by 2030.
views.zh: 2023年至2026年：AI安全需要追求真相的AI；需要监管监督；AI可能在2030年前超越所有人类。

views.en: Neuralink treats neurological damage; human-AI symbiosis via high-bandwidth interface; brain state saving possible.
views.zh: 2024年至2026年：Neuralink治疗神经损伤；通过高带宽接口实现人机共生；脑状态保存可能。

views.en: Optimus humanoid robot will be greatest product; humanoid robots enable recursive manufacturing and abundance.
views.zh: 2025年至2026年：Optimus人形机器人将是最伟大的产品；人形机器人实现递归制造和富足。

views.en: Space-based AI data centers needed within 36 months due to Earth power wall; solar in space is key.
views.zh: 2026年：由于地球电力瓶颈，36个月内需要太空AI数据中心；太空太阳能是关键。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: A co-author of "Attention Is All You Need" (the Transformer paper) and co-creator of TensorFlow's Tensor2Tensor. Now at OpenAI, working on reasoning models.
people.bioZh: Transformer 奠基论文《Attention Is All You Need》的共同作者，TensorFlow Tensor2Tensor 的共同创造者。现于 OpenAI 研究推理模型。

episodes.tEn: Is Reasoning Enough for Generalization?
Why AI Progress Isn't Slowing Down

views.en: AI progress follows smooth exponential, not slowdown; pre-training scaling still works but reasoning models offer more gains per compute.
views.zh: 2025年：AI进展呈平滑指数增长而非放缓；预训练缩放定律仍有效，但推理模型每单位算力收益更高。

views.en: Post-training improvements like RL and synthetic data drive most recent model gains; distillation and economics slowed pre-training scaling.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：后训练改进（如强化学习和合成数据）驱动了近期模型进步；蒸馏和经济因素减缓了预训练规模扩张。

views.en: Transformers with reasoning, RL, and tools solve hard problems but still need vast data; generalization remains key challenge.
views.zh: 2026年：结合推理、强化学习和工具的Transformer能解决难题但仍需海量数据；泛化仍是关键挑战。

views.en: Multimodal capabilities lag behind text; models have jagged edges—excellent in some areas, poor in nearby ones.
views.zh: 始终：多模态能力落后于文本；模型存在“锯齿状”表现——某些领域优秀，邻近领域却很差。

views.en: Near-term risks like system hacking are more pressing than existential risk from AI.
views.zh: 始终：系统入侵等近期风险比AI存在风险更紧迫。

people.tiZh: CMU 教授 · OpenAI 董事
people.bioEn: A Carnegie Mellon professor and head of its machine learning department, and a member of OpenAI's board. Known for work on adversarial robustness and deep learning theory.
people.bioZh: 卡内基梅隆大学教授、机器学习系主任，OpenAI 董事会成员。以对抗鲁棒性与深度学习理论的研究著称。

episodes.tEn: AI Red Teaming Outperforms Humans
AI Safety Oversight at OpenAI: A Conversation with Ziko Culture
AI Data Crisis: Myth or Reality?
Machine Learning Algorithms, Unsupervised Learning, and Probability

views.en: Framed ML as hypothesis class, loss, optimization; stressed proper evaluation to avoid overfitting.
views.zh: 2014年：将机器学习框架化为假设类、损失函数和优化方法；强调正确评估以避免过拟合。

views.en: Next-token prediction yields intelligence; data shortage is a myth; safety focus on specification failures.
views.zh: 2024年：下一个词预测产生智能；数据短缺是迷思；安全焦点在于规范失败。

views.en: Safety requires explicit training and layers; bigger models not automatically safer; agent security is new frontier.
views.zh: 2026年：安全需要显式训练和多层防护；更大模型不会自动更安全；智能体安全是新前沿。

views.en: AI has alien intelligence; automated red teaming outperforms humans; models may sandbag in evaluations.
views.zh: 2026年：AI具有外星智能；自动红队测试超越人类；模型可能在评估中隐藏能力。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 研究员
people.bioEn: A researcher at Anthropic focused on scaling and reinforcement learning, and a prominent young voice on how far today's models can really go.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 研究员，专注于规模扩张与强化学习；关于「当前模型究竟能走多远」的代表性青年声音。

Long Context: The Underhyped Key to Superhuman AI

views.en: Long context windows are underhyped; they solve onboarding and boost intelligence. Fine-tuning may become obsolete.
views.zh: 2024年：长上下文窗口被低估，能解决上手问题并提升智能；微调可能过时。

views.en: RL from verifiable rewards is key for expert performance. Alignment faking raises safety concerns.
views.zh: 2025年：基于可验证奖励的强化学习是实现专家级性能的关键；对齐伪装引发安全担忧。

views.en: Pre-training plus RL is likely sufficient for AGI. Coding is the leading indicator for AI progress.
views.zh: 2025→26年：预训练加强化学习可能足以实现AGI；编程是AI进步的领先指标。

views.en: RL is a new scaling axis. Longer agentic coherence (30h) expands capabilities dramatically.
views.zh: 2025→26年：强化学习是新的扩展轴；更长的智能体连贯性（30小时）极大扩展能力。

views.en: Models have massive capability overhang; tools and orchestration matter more than raw intelligence now.
views.zh: 2026年：模型能力过剩；工具和编排比原始智能更重要。

people.tiZh: Ai2 研究科学家
people.bioEn: A research scientist at the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) working on RLHF and open models (OLMo), and author of the widely-read Interconnects newsletter.
people.bioZh: 艾伦人工智能研究所（Ai2）研究科学家，从事 RLHF 与开放模型（OLMo）;广受关注的 Interconnects 通讯作者。

Open Models as the Engine for the Next Decade of AI Research

AI2 Launches Fully Open Almo 3 Models, Challenging Closed-Source AI

Tulu 3: Open Source Post-Training for LLMs
AI's Societal Impact and Openness in Model Development

views.en: RLHF remains dominant; openness crucial; synthetic data effective; safety is system-level; audio lowers barriers.
views.zh: 2024年：RLHF仍为主流，开放性至关重要，合成数据有效，安全是系统级属性，音频降低使用门槛。

views.en: Post-training evolves from SFT+DPO+RL to RLVR; data quality beats algorithms; open-source matches frontier models.
views.zh: 2024→2025年：后训练从SFT+DPO+RL演进到RLVR；数据质量优于算法；开源可媲美前沿模型。

views.en: Pre-training scaling not dead but less cost-effective; gains shift to post-training and inference scaling.
views.zh: 2025→2026年：预训练Scaling未死但性价比降低；收益转向后训练和推理Scaling。

views.en: Chinese open models fill US vacuum; open models key for research but lag 6-9 months behind closed ones.
views.zh: 2026年：中国开源模型填补美国空白；开源模型对研究关键但落后闭源6-9个月。

views.en: Open-source AI requires full transparency; data quality and curation are critical across pre-training and post-training.
views.zh: 始终：开源AI需要完全透明；数据质量和整理在预训练和后训练中都至关重要。

people.tiZh: Scale AI 创始人 · Meta 超智能
people.bioEn: Founder and former CEO of Scale AI, which built much of the data infrastructure behind modern AI. In 2025 he joined Meta to lead its Superintelligence Labs.
people.bioZh: Scale AI 创始人兼前 CEO——它构建了现代 AI 背后的大量数据基础设施。2025 年加入 Meta，领导其超级智能实验室。

Alexander Wang on Data as the New Code and the Future of AI
Scale AI CEO Alexander Wang on Raising $100M at 22

views.en: AGI is far off; data, not compute, is the key bottleneck for AI progress.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI还很遥远；数据而非算力是AI进步的关键瓶颈。

views.en: Data is the new code, not oil; post-training with proprietary data is key for enterprise AI.
views.zh: 2023年：数据是新代码而非新石油；用专有数据做后训练是企业AI的关键。

views.en: Post-training with specialized data is key; synthetic data helps but is not a silver bullet.
views.zh: 2024年：用专门数据做后训练是关键；合成数据有用但非万能。

views.en: AI enters recursive self-improvement era; agents finally work, starting in late 2025.
views.zh: 2025→26年：AI进入递归自我改进时代；智能体终于在2025年底开始工作。

views.en: Superintelligence is coming soon; scaling compute, data, and RL across multiple axes drives progress.
views.zh: 2026年：超级智能即将到来；跨多个轴扩展算力、数据和强化学习驱动进步。

people.tiZh: Claude Code 创造者 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Creator and lead of Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic command-line coding tool, and a central figure in the shift to AI-driven software engineering.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 智能体命令行编程工具 Claude Code 的创造者与负责人；AI 驱动软件工程浪潮中的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Claude Tag: Proactive AI That Remembers and Acts Autonomously
AI Coding on Phone: Boris on 8B Tokens & ROI
The Origin of Claude Code: From Accident to Agent
Will AI Replace Software Engineers?
Claude Code's Explosive Growth and the Future of AI Agents
Claude Code: The Accidental Revolution in Software Development
From Pokémon Cards to AI: The Claude Code Story
Claude Code: The End of Software Engineering as We Know It
Building for the Model 6 Months from Now: The Accidental Creation of Claude Code
Boris Chney: From Meta to Claude Code, Building Products with Generalists

views.en: Latent demand is key: find existing user intent and build around it. Build for the model 6 months from now.
views.zh: 潜在需求是关键：找到现有用户意图并围绕它构建。为6个月后的模型而构建。

views.en: Coding is virtually solved; productivity per engineer grew 150-200%. Software engineer title will fade into 'builder'.
views.zh: 编码几乎已解决；每位工程师的生产力增长了150-200%。软件工程师头衔将淡化为“构建者”。

views.en: Safety is studied by releasing early; internal evals aren't enough. Claude Code started as an accident, not a planned product.
views.zh: 安全通过早期发布来研究；内部评估不够。Claude Code始于意外，而非计划产品。

views.en: Coding solved for many tasks; non-engineers adopt AI. Self-improving AI may arrive by 2028.
views.zh: 编码对许多任务已解决；非工程师采用AI。自我改进的AI可能在2028年到来。

views.en: 100% of my code written by Claude since Opus 4.5; I code on my phone. Next bottlenecks: review, security, idea generation.
views.zh: 自Opus 4.5以来我100%的代码由Claude编写；我在手机上编码。下一个瓶颈：审查、安全、创意生成。

people.tiZh: Claude Code 产品 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: A product manager on Claude Code at Anthropic, shaping how developers work with agentic coding tools and how the team ships so fast.
people.bioZh: Anthropic Claude Code 团队产品经理，塑造开发者与智能体编程工具协作的方式，以及团队的高速迭代。

episodes.tEn: The New PM Playbook for AI-Native Products

people.tiZh: Claude Code 与 Cowork 负责人 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork teams at Anthropic, overseeing engineering and product (including Boris Cherny and Cat Wu). A 25-year engineer who earlier built TypeScript and Visual Studio at Microsoft and started Facebook Marketplace at Meta.
people.bioZh: Anthropic Claude Code 与 Cowork 团队负责人，统管工程与产品（含鲍里斯·切尔尼、凯特·吴）。25 年工龄的工程师，早年在微软打造 TypeScript 与 Visual Studio，在 Meta 创立 Facebook Marketplace。

episodes.tEn: Fiona Fung on AI's Impact on Software Engineering
From Microsoft to Meta: Leadership Lessons in Speed, War Rooms, and Trust

views.en: Leadership: one-on-ones for live talk, not status; dogfooding builds empathy; kindness is strategic.
views.zh: 2026年初，强调领导力：一对一用于实时对话而非状态更新；亲自使用产品建立同理心；友善是战略工具。

views.en: Coding bottleneck removed; focus shifts to verification, high agency, and just-in-time planning.
views.zh: 2026年中，认为编码不再是瓶颈；重点转向验证、高主动性和即时规划。

views.en: Dogfooding and staying hands-on are essential for leaders to maintain product pulse and empathy.
views.zh: 始终强调领导者应亲自使用产品并保持动手，以维持产品脉搏和同理心。

views.en: Mission alignment and speed are key cultural drivers; culture evolves, find aligned teams.
views.zh: 始终认为使命对齐和速度是关键文化驱动力；文化会演变，要找到契合的团队。

views.en: From war rooms as months-long to AI era: planning must be just-in-time and lightweight.
views.zh: 从2026年初的长期作战室到年中：AI时代规划必须即时且轻量。

people.tiEn: VP of Research & Gemini Co-lead · Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁 · Gemini 共同负责人
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind and a co-lead of Gemini. Pioneered sequence-to-sequence learning and AlphaStar (StarCraft II), and contributed to AlphaFold — a central architect of frontier models and agents.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁、Gemini 共同负责人。序列到序列学习的开创者、AlphaStar（星际争霸 II）主导者，亦参与 AlphaFold——前沿模型与智能体的核心架构师。

episodes.tEn: Oriol Vinyals on World Models, Multimodal AI, and the Path to AGI
From Starcraft to Gemini: The Evolution of AI Agents

views.en: Two-phase training (pre-training imitation + post-training RL) is the constant core across AlphaGo, AlphaStar, and modern LLMs.
views.zh: 两阶段训练（预训练模仿 + 后训练强化学习）是贯穿 AlphaGo、AlphaStar 和现代大语言模型的恒定核心。

views.en: Scaling pre-training shows diminishing returns; further progress needs algorithmic innovation, not just bigger models.
views.zh: 预训练的规模扩张收益递减；进一步进展需要算法创新，而不仅仅是更大的模型。

views.en: Inference-time compute (thinking) is a new scaling axis that can improve reasoning and break pre-training limits.
views.zh: 推理时算力（思考）是一个新的规模扩张轴，可以提升推理能力并突破预训练的限制。

views.en: World models that jointly model language, vision, and video are a core path to AGI.
views.zh: 联合建模语言、视觉和视频的世界模型是通往 AGI 的核心路径。

views.en: Post-training and RL remain a green field with huge potential beyond coding and math.
views.zh: 后训练和强化学习仍然是一个充满巨大潜力的蓝海，超越编码和数学领域。

people.tiZh: Isomorphic Labs 首席 AI 官
people.bioEn: Chief AI Officer at Isomorphic Labs, applying AI to drug discovery. Earlier at DeepMind he led reinforcement-learning breakthroughs — Capture the Flag, population-based training and AlphaStar.
people.bioZh: Isomorphic Labs 首席 AI 官，用 AI 攻坚药物发现。早年在 DeepMind 主导强化学习突破——夺旗（Capture the Flag）、群体训练（PBT）与 AlphaStar。

episodes.tEn: Building a General AI Drug Design Engine: From AlphaFold 3 to Superhuman Creativity

people.tiEn: Principal Scientist · Google DeepMind; Professor, Imperial College
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 首席科学家 · 帝国理工教授
people.bioEn: Principal Scientist at Google DeepMind and Professor of Cognitive Robotics at Imperial College London. Works on AI reasoning, embodiment and the philosophy of mind; scientific advisor on the film Ex Machina.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 首席科学家、帝国理工学院认知机器人学教授。研究 AI 推理、具身与心智哲学；电影《机械姬》（Ex Machina）的科学顾问。

episodes.tEn: AI, Consciousness, and the Future of Mind

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at Google DeepMind and a co-lead of Genie, the line of general-purpose world models that generate interactive, playable environments. Works on open-endedness and reinforcement learning.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，通用世界模型 Genie 的共同负责人——可即时生成可交互、可游玩的环境。专注开放式学习与强化学习。

episodes.tEn: Genie 3: A 100x Leap in World Models

people.tiEn: Chief Scientist, Together AI; Professor, Princeton
people.tiZh: Together AI 首席科学家 · 普林斯顿教授
people.bioEn: Creator of FlashAttention and co-inventor of Mamba (state-space models). Chief Scientist at Together AI and a professor at Princeton, focused on efficient architectures and hardware-aware algorithms.
people.bioZh: FlashAttention 作者、Mamba（状态空间模型）共同发明人。Together AI 首席科学家、普林斯顿大学教授，专注高效架构与硬件感知算法。

episodes.tEn: The Future of AI Hardware and Architecture with Tri Dao

people.tiZh: CMU 助理教授 · Cartesia 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-inventor of structured state-space models (S4) and Mamba, a leading alternative to the Transformer for long-sequence modeling. Assistant professor at CMU and co-founder of Cartesia.
people.bioZh: 结构化状态空间模型（S4）与 Mamba 的共同发明人——长序列建模中 Transformer 的主要替代路线。CMU 助理教授、Cartesia 联合创始人。

episodes.tEn: Efficiently Modeling Long Sequences with Structured State Spaces

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员（前微软研究院）
people.bioEn: Led the team behind the phi small-language-model series and co-authored Sparks of AGI, an influential early study of GPT-4. Now at OpenAI, previously a VP at Microsoft Research.
people.bioZh: phi 小模型系列的主导者，《Sparks of AGI》（对 GPT-4 的早期深度研究）合著者。现就职 OpenAI，曾任微软研究院副总裁。

episodes.tEn: Sparks of AGI: Early Experiments with GPT-4

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼首席科学家
people.bioEn: Co-founder and Chief Scientist of Mistral AI. Previously at Meta, where he led the original LLaMA models that catalysed the open-weight LLM movement.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。曾在 Meta 主导初代 LLaMA 模型，点燃了开放权重大模型浪潮。

episodes.tEn: Mistral Releases Boxtral TTS: Efficient Speech Generation with Novel Architecture

people.tiZh: OpenAI 首席研究官
people.bioEn: Chief Research Officer at OpenAI. Led work on DALL·E, Codex and the o-series reasoning models, and is a central figure in setting OpenAI research direction.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 首席研究官。主导 DALL·E、Codex 与 o 系列推理模型，是 OpenAI 研究方向的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: From Trading to AGI: Mark Chen on Research Taste and Replication
AI in Mathematics: From Ineffective Grad Student to Gold Medal Performance
The AI Talent War: Soup Diplomacy and Recruiting Strategies

views.en: Pre-training is a key muscle to rebuild; scaling laws are not dead and there is much room left.
views.zh: 2025年强调预训练是需要重建的关键能力，缩放定律并未失效，仍有很大空间。

views.en: AI will soon automate scientific research; within 1 year AI interns, within 2.5 years end-to-end AI research.
views.zh: 2025年预测AI将很快自动化科学研究，设定1年内AI实习生、2.5年内端到端AI研究的具体目标。

views.en: AI tools can solve many open math problems with minimal human supervision; verification is key bottleneck.
views.zh: 2026年认为AI工具已能解决许多开放数学问题，验证是关键瓶颈。

views.en: Scaling laws still hold; pre-training is not dead. RL excels in objective domains, not subjective ones.
views.zh: 2026年重申缩放定律仍然成立，预训练未死；强化学习擅长客观领域而非主观领域。

views.en: Alignment challenges like model scheming will be key in next 1-2 years as models become more capable.
views.zh: 始终认为随着模型能力增强，模型欺骗等对齐挑战将在未来1-2年内成为关键问题。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & Chief Science Officer, Hugging Face
people.tiZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼首席科学官
people.bioEn: Co-founder and Chief Science Officer of Hugging Face, the hub of the open-source AI ecosystem. A driving force behind the Transformers library and open model research.
people.bioZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼首席科学官——开源 AI 生态的中枢。Transformers 库与开放模型研究背后的核心推动者。

episodes.tEn: HuggingFace's Leap into Robotics: Building an Open Source Community for Physical AI

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CEO（前 DeepMind）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Reflection AI, building autonomous coding agents toward superintelligence. Previously a research scientist at Google DeepMind working on RL and Gemini.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，打造迈向超级智能的自主编程智能体。曾任 Google DeepMind 研究科学家，从事强化学习与 Gemini。

episodes.tEn: Building Organizational Superintelligence: Misha on Reflection AI's Vision

people.tiZh: 斯坦福副教授 · 基础模型研究中心主任
people.bioEn: Associate professor at Stanford and director of the Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM). Known for HELM benchmarking, rigorous evaluation, and work on the science and transparency of foundation models.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福大学副教授、基础模型研究中心（CRFM）主任。以 HELM 评测体系、严谨的模型评估，以及基础模型的科学性与透明度研究著称。

episodes.tEn: Percy Liang on Foundation Models, Shared Reality, and the Evolution of NLP

people.tiEn: Director, Google DeepMind; Nobel Laureate in Chemistry
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 总监 · 诺贝尔化学奖得主
people.bioEn: Led AlphaFold, the AI system that solved protein-structure prediction, earning the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. A director at Google DeepMind applying deep learning to the foundations of biology.
people.bioZh: AlphaFold 的主导者——攻克蛋白质结构预测的 AI 系统，获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。Google DeepMind 总监，用深度学习改写生物学根基。

episodes.tEn: AlphaFold: AI's Nobel-Winning Leap in Protein Folding
AlphaFold: From Grand Challenge to Nobel Prize
AlphaFold, Nobel Prize, and the Future of AI in Biology

views.en: AlphaFold's success came from research innovation, not just data and compute; curated data like PDB was essential.
views.zh: 2025年指出，AlphaFold的成功源于研究创新，而非单纯的数据和算力；像PDB这样精心策划的数据集至关重要。

views.en: AlphaFold 2 is opposite of bitter lesson: specialized architecture, not just scaling, drove progress.
views.zh: 2025至2026年强调，AlphaFold 2与苦涩教训相反：专用架构而非单纯规模扩张推动了进步。

views.en: AlphaFold 3's diffusion solves large-scale structure first, opposite to image diffusion; understanding remains human.
views.zh: 2026年指出，AlphaFold 3的扩散模型先解大尺度结构，与图像扩散相反；理解仍属于人类。

views.en: Confidence metrics are key for trust in AI predictions; AI tools narrow hypothesis space, not replace scientists.
views.zh: 始终认为，置信度指标是信任AI预测的关键；AI工具缩小假设空间，而非取代科学家。

views.en: AlphaFold is a narrow predictor of a specific experiment, not a model of the entire cell.
views.zh: 始终强调，AlphaFold是特定实验的窄预测器，而非整个细胞的模型。

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; pioneer of computer vision
people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授 · 计算机视觉奠基人
people.bioEn: One of the founding figures of modern computer vision, a professor at UC Berkeley whose work spans perception, segmentation and sensorimotor learning. Mentor to a generation of vision and robotics researchers.
people.bioZh: 现代计算机视觉的奠基人之一，加州大学伯克利分校教授，研究横跨感知、分割与感觉运动学习，培养了一代视觉与机器人研究者。

episodes.tEn: Berkeley Professor Jitendra Malik on AI's Limits vs Human Intelligence

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; foundations of machine learning
people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授 · 机器学习理论奠基人
people.bioEn: One of the most influential researchers in machine learning and statistics, a professor at UC Berkeley. Shaped graphical models, variational inference and the view of intelligence as a collective, economic system.
people.bioZh: 机器学习与统计学最具影响力的研究者之一，加州大学伯克利分校教授。奠定图模型、变分推断，并提出「智能是一种集体性、经济性系统」的视角。

episodes.tEn: AI Hype Hurts Young Innovators

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CTO, Sakana AI; Transformer co-author
people.tiZh: Sakana AI 联合创始人兼 CTO · Transformer 共同作者
people.bioEn: A co-author of the original Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need). Co-founder and CTO of Sakana AI, exploring nature-inspired methods like model merging and continuous thought machines.
people.bioZh: Transformer 原始论文（《Attention Is All You Need》）的共同作者。Sakana AI 联合创始人兼 CTO，探索模型融合、连续思维机器等受自然启发的方法。

episodes.tEn: From Transformer Inventor to Continuous Thought Machine: A New Path in AI

people.tiEn: Professor, Stanford (prev. NVIDIA, AI2); commonsense reasoning
people.tiZh: 斯坦福大学教授（前 NVIDIA、AI2）· 常识推理
people.bioEn: A MacArthur Fellow and professor at Stanford known for advancing commonsense reasoning, language generation and the social and moral understanding of AI. Previously a senior director at NVIDIA and AI2.
people.bioZh: 麦克阿瑟天才奖得主、斯坦福大学教授，以推进常识推理、语言生成，以及 AI 的社会与道德理解著称。曾任 NVIDIA 与 AI2 高级总监。

episodes.tEn: Democratizing AI: The Case for Small Language Models
AI's Data Hunger: From Internet to Synthetic Data and the Quest for True Knowledge
Yejin Choi on Large Language Models: Progress, Limitations, and the Quest for Intelligence

views.en: Scaling alone may not solve common sense; alternative solutions using less compute likely exist.
views.zh: 2023年：仅靠Scaling可能无法解决常识问题；存在使用更少算力的替代方案。

views.en: Pre-training next-token prediction is misaligned with human learning; RL during pre-training improves reasoning.
views.zh: 2023年指出预训练的下一个词预测与人类学习不一致；2025年提出在预训练中加入强化学习可提升推理能力。

views.en: Smaller models with better data and algorithms can outperform larger ones on specific tasks.
views.zh: 从2023年到2026年，始终认为更小的模型配合更好的数据和算法能在特定任务上超越大模型。

views.en: Data is the fundamental bottleneck; synthetic data must be diverse and high-quality.
views.zh: 2025年强调数据是根本瓶颈；2026年进一步要求合成数据必须多样且高质量。

views.en: Pluralistic alignment respects diverse human values; debiasing the internet is impossible.
views.zh: 2025年提出多元对齐；2026年明确去偏互联网不可行，多元对齐是更好路径。

people.tiEn: VP & Distinguished Scientist, Microsoft AI (prev. DeepMind)
people.tiZh: 微软 AI 副总裁兼杰出科学家（前 DeepMind）
people.bioEn: A leading deep-learning researcher who led the Gato generalist agent and many multimodal efforts at DeepMind. Now a VP at Microsoft AI, and long known for his influential teaching on machine learning.
people.bioZh: 顶尖深度学习研究者，在 DeepMind 主导通用智能体 Gato 及大量多模态工作。现任微软 AI 副总裁；以其影响深远的机器学习公开课闻名。

episodes.tEn: AI in Africa: Leapfrogging Challenges and Exceeding Expectations
Nando de Freitas on AI as a Tool for All Humanity

views.en: AI should augment humans; generalist agents tokenizing all inputs are a step toward AGI.
views.zh: 2023年，AI应增强人类能力；将一切输入转化为token的通用智能体是迈向AGI的一步。

views.en: Learning from video (e.g., YouTube) can train agents without expensive RL, challenging teleoperation dogma.
views.zh: 2023年，从视频（如YouTube）学习可训练智能体，无需昂贵强化学习，挑战了遥操作教条。

views.en: Africa leapfrogged gender gaps in tech; language models can revolutionize local-language education.
views.zh: 2026年，非洲已跨越科技领域的性别差距；语言模型可革新本地语言教育。

views.en: AI safety is the biggest open challenge; we lack solutions despite progress.
views.zh: 2026年，AI安全是最大的未解挑战；尽管有进展，我们仍缺乏解决方案。

views.en: Embraces failure and simplifying problems; human skills like communication are as vital as coding.
views.zh: 始终，拥抱失败与简化问题；沟通等人文技能与编程同等重要。

people.tiEn: Director, Center for AI Safety; advisor to xAI
people.tiZh: AI 安全中心主任 · xAI 顾问
people.bioEn: Director of the Center for AI Safety and an advisor to xAI. Created widely used benchmarks (MMLU, MATH) and the GELU activation, and is a leading voice on catastrophic AI risk.
people.bioZh: AI 安全中心（CAIS）主任、xAI 顾问。提出广泛使用的评测基准（MMLU、MATH）与 GELU 激活函数，是灾难性 AI 风险议题的核心声音。

episodes.tEn: Super Intelligence Strategy: Beyond Humanity's Last Exam

people.tiZh: fast.ai 与 Answer.AI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of fast.ai, whose free courses trained a generation of deep-learning practitioners, and of Answer.AI. Co-created ULMFiT, a key precursor to modern transfer learning in NLP.
people.bioZh: fast.ai 联合创始人——其免费课程培养了一代深度学习从业者；亦创办 Answer.AI。共同提出 ULMFiT，是现代 NLP 迁移学习的关键先驱。

episodes.tEn: Jeremy Howard: The Art of Understanding AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人 · 可解释性先驱
people.bioEn: A co-founder of Anthropic who leads its interpretability research. Pioneered the mechanistic interpretability of neural networks — circuits, features and the effort to reverse-engineer what models actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，领导其可解释性研究。开创了神经网络的机制可解释性——电路、特征，以及「逆向工程」模型内部到底在计算什么。

episodes.tEn: Chris Olah on Neural Network Interpretability and AI Safety

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机制可解释性负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the mechanistic interpretability team at Google DeepMind. A prominent educator on understanding the internals of language models, known for open tutorials, the TransformerLens library and superposition research.
people.bioZh: 领导 Google DeepMind 的机制可解释性团队。在「理解大模型内部」上影响广泛，以公开教程、TransformerLens 库与叠加（superposition）研究著称。

episodes.tEn: Maximizing Luck Surface Area: Neil Nando on Building a Career in AI

people.tiZh: Physical Intelligence 联合创始人兼 CEO

people.tiZh: Physical Intelligence 研究科学家（前 DeepMind）
people.bioEn: A research scientist at Physical Intelligence working on robot foundation models. Previously at DeepMind, with influential work on reinforcement learning (MPO), the all-convolutional network and guided backpropagation.
people.bioZh: Physical Intelligence 研究科学家，从事机器人基础模型。曾在 DeepMind，在强化学习（MPO）、全卷积网络与引导式反向传播等方向有重要工作。

episodes.tEn: Building Foundation Models for Robotics with Physical Intelligence

people.tiEn: Assistant Professor, CMU; Co-founder, Skild AI
people.tiZh: CMU 助理教授 · Skild AI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Assistant professor at CMU and co-founder of Skild AI, building a general-purpose robot brain. Known for curiosity-driven exploration, self-supervised learning and rapid robot adaptation in the real world.
